message:
test(fcp-core): pin OperationStatus JSON text + CBOR hex per variant

Hardens the existing operation_outcome_serde_roundtrip pin by extending
each `Case` row with the exact JSON text and CBOR hex bytes for every
`OperationStatus` variant, so wire-format drift fails the test rather
than silently passing through round-trip equivalence:

  Pending    → "Pending"    / 6750656e64696e67
  Running    → "Running"    / 6752756e6e696e67
  Completed  → "Completed"  / 69436f6d706c65746564
  Failed     → "Failed"     / 664661696c6564

Previously the suite only checked `serde_json::to_value` against a
`json!(case.tag)` macro and CBOR round-trip equality. Now it also
asserts `serde_json::to_string` byte-for-byte and the literal CBOR hex
encoding, locking the externally-observable tag spelling, the JSON
quoting style, and the CBOR Text major-type prefix length-byte that
cross-language consumers dispatch on.

Continues the test-pinning sweep tracked in flywheel_connectors-m92z0
(Pin fcp-core OperationOutcome serde tag matrix).
